pi_items.source: Verified by reading setup_task.sh which calls setup_task_project('trace_content') and task_utils.sh which resolves the path to /home/ga/Documents/ReqView/trace_content_project.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh which calls setup_task_project('trace_content') and task_utils.sh which resolves the path to /home/ga/Documents/ReqView/trace_content_project.

Code analysis of setup_task.sh, which dynamically injects SRS 901 (AES-256), SRS 902 (200ms latency), and SRS 903 (WCAG), along with NEEDS 801 (Privacy), 802 (Performance), and 803 (Inclusivity), logically linking them as claimed.

privileged_info_summary: The correct traceability links the agent must establish are SRS-901 to NEEDS-801 (Encryption to Privacy), SRS-902 to NEEDS-802 (Latency to Performance), and SRS-903 to NEEDS-803 (Accessibility to Inclusivity). The project data is located at /home/ga/Documents/ReqView/trace_content_project/.
